body.value: 少参事 澤邨恒三藤原武成・不破亮三郎藤原貞順・北川亥之作克由・中川甚六源忠良
少参事（しょうさんじ）— 澤邨恒三（藤原武成）・不破亮三郎（藤原貞順）・北川亥之作（克由）・中川甚六（源忠良）の四名

Junior Councillor (shō-sanji). Reading right-to-left, the four named Junior Councillors are Sawamura Tsunezō (Fujiwara no Takeshige), Fuwa Ryōzaburō (Fujiwara no Sadayori), Kitagawa Inosaku (Katsuyoshi), and Nakagawa Jinroku (Minamoto no Tadayoshi). Which of the page-301 names fall under 少参事 vs 権少参事 is read from the layout (the 少参事 heading sits atop the leftmost column of its block). NOTE: the "少参事 十一員 / 権少参事 八員" counts on the facing page (p162R) are NOT Kanazawa's — they print to the RIGHT of the ○金澤藩 boundary marker and so belong to the preceding domain. Kanazawa's own junior councillors are given here only by name.
rank header
少参事
権少参事 岡島喜太郎藤原一式（長九郎右衛門）・斯波蕃源正邦・丹羽次郎藤原履信・稲葉助五郎越智通安・本多時雨平藤原政醇
権少参事（ごんしょうさんじ）— 岡島喜太郎（藤原一式、別名 長九郎右衛門）・斯波蕃（源正邦）・丹羽次郎（藤原履信）・稲葉助五郎（越智通安）・本多時雨平（藤原政醇）の五名

Provisional Junior Councillor (gon-shō-sanji). The rank heading 権少参事 (previously left unboxed) sits atop the leftmost of its five name columns; reading right-to-left the five named officers are Okajima Kitarō (Fujiwara no Kazushiki, alternate name 長九郎右衛門 in a hanging gloss), Shiba Shigeru (Minamoto no Masakuni), Niwa Jirō (Fujiwara no Fuminobu), Inaba Sukegorō (Ochi no Michiyasu), and Honda Shigurehei (Fujiwara no Masazumi). A red-ink addendum of four further names is appended below. NOTE: the "権少参事 八員 / 少参事 十一員" counts on the facing page (p162R) are NOT Kanazawa's — they sit to the RIGHT of the ○金澤藩 boundary marker and belong to the preceding domain; Kanazawa's own entry on p162R is 知事 前田慶寧 / 大参事 篠原勘六 / 権大参事 陸原慎太郎.
9-name roster
権少参事
步兵 五大隊 但一大隊銃兵三百貳拾員 士官役々 合五百十六員
歩兵（ほへい）五大隊 — 但し一大隊あたり銃兵320員、士官役々合わせて516員
Infantry — 5 battalions. The note reads: 320 riflemen per battalion (但一大隊銃兵三百二十員), with officers and staff totalling 516 (士官役々合五百十六員).
5 battalions (320 riflemen each)
步兵 五大隊
砲兵 三隊 但砲兵一隊百四十四員 士官役々 合百八十六員
砲兵（ほうへい）三隊 — 但し一隊あたり144員、士官役々合わせて186員
Artillery — 3 units. The note reads: 144 men per unit (但砲兵一隊百四十四員), with officers and staff totalling 186 (士官役々合百八十六員).
3 units (144 men each)
砲兵 三隊
此人員 但シ小隊ナルヘシ
此の人員、但し小隊なるべし
A marginal editorial note — '此人員、但シ小隊ナルヘシ' ('these personnel — read as platoon-level'), qualifying how the corps figures above should be understood.
editorial note
此人員 但小隊
藩制一覧表第八 （金澤）
藩制一覧表 第八冊（金澤藩）
Page header — Domain Survey, eighth fascicle (officials + military register), Kanazawa section. The printed page number 三百一 (301) is in the bottom margin.
Table 8 header
藩制一覧表第八
（原朱）成瀬主税・赤座甚七郎・小幡和平・不破亮三郎
（原朱＝朱書）成瀬主税・赤座甚七郎・小幡和平・不破亮三郎 — 権少参事への朱書追加四名

Red-ink addendum (原朱 = entered in vermilion in the original manuscript): Naruse Chikara, Akaza Jinshichirō, Obata Wahei, and Fuwa Ryōzaburō — four names appended in red beneath the 権少参事 (Provisional Junior Councillor) column, amending that rank’s roster. (The fourth, Fuwa Ryōzaburō, is the same man already listed in black ink as the second 少参事.) Red-ink entries in Hansei Ichiran typically mark a later correction or addition.
4 names (red-ink addendum)
（原朱）成瀬主税ほか
